subcodes.first_line: O Thou Forgiver! O Thou Lord Almighty! These spirits like unto swift-winged birds were set free from the earthly nest
subcodes.first_line_orig: آمرزگارا ایزد بزرگوارا این جانها مانند مرغان تیزپر از دام خاکدان آزاد شدند و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @soul; spirit after death
